Class ConfigClientProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.client.ConfigClientProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.config") public class ConfigClientProperties extends Object
Author:
Dave Syer

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ConfigClientProperties.Credentials
    Credentials properties.
    static class

    Discovery properties.
    static enum 
    ConfigClientProperties.MultipleUriStrategy
    Enumerates possible strategies to use when multiple URLs are provided and an error occurs.
